canonical_definition: An adversarial dataset of potentially harmful queries designed to test the safety of language models.
papers: Prompt Risk Control: A Rigorous Framework for Responsible Deployment of Large Language Models
Unmasking and Improving Data Credibility: A Study with Datasets for Training Harmless Language Models

definitions.text: An adversarial dataset of potentially harmful queries designed to test the safety of language models.
definitions.paper: Prompt Risk Control: A Rigorous Framework for Responsible Deployment of Large Language Models

definitions.text: A dataset of ~40k multi-round conversations between red teamers and AI assistants, scored on a 5-level scale for harmfulness, used to evaluate model safety under adversarial probing.
definitions.paper: Unmasking and Improving Data Credibility: A Study with Datasets for Training Harmless Language Models
